'''shabogo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:qobar|qobar]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-b-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:qobar|qobar]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| shabogo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:shæbegeth|shæbegeth]] || [[word:shæbegej|shæbegej]] || [[word:shæbegesh|shæbegesh]] || [[word:shæbege|shæbege]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:shabobogoth|shabobogoth]] || [[word:shabobogoj|shabobogoj]] || [[word:shabobogosh|shabobogosh]] || [[word:shabobogo|shabobogo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:shabogoth|shabogoth]] || [[word:shabogoj|shabogoj]] || [[word:shabogosh|shabogosh]] || [[word:shabogo|shabogo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:shabofgoth|shabofgoth]] || [[word:shabofgoj|shabofgoj]] || [[word:shabofgosh|shabofgosh]] || [[word:shabofgof|shabofgof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:shabogotho|shabogotho]] || [[word:shabogojo|shabogojo]] || [[word:shabogosho|shabogosho]] || [[word:shabogoko|shabogoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:shabogoth|shabogoth]] || [[word:shabogoj|shabogoj]] || [[word:shabogosh|shabogosh]] || [[word:shabogo|shabogo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:shabogothol|shabogothol]] || [[word:shabogojol|shabogojol]] || [[word:shabogoshol|shabogoshol]] || [[word:shabogokol|shabogokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:shabogothotho|shabogothotho]] || [[word:shabogojojo|shabogojojo]] || [[word:shabogoshosho|shabogoshosho]] || [[word:shabogoko|shabogoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:shabogothon|shabogothon]] || [[word:shabogojon|shabogojon]] || [[word:shabogoshon|shabogoshon]] || [[word:shabogokon|shabogokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:shabogothoro|shabogothoro]] || [[word:shabogojoro|shabogojoro]] || [[word:shabogoshoro|shabogoshoro]] || [[word:shabogokoro|shabogokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|16f482d}}
